# Live Product Tour: WhatsApp

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: WhatsApp

May 20, 2025

15 minutes

On demand

## Description

Join our experts on our Live Product Tour as they walk you through our new native WhatsApp integration, and see firsthand how Iterable is helping leading brands deliver personalized, goal-driven campaigns.

What you’ll learn:

*   How to use Iterable’s new native WhatsApp channel to reach global audiences, driving engagement, and boost ROI.
*   How to incorporate WhatsApp into your existing journeys and campaigns, and test its performance against traditional channels like email and SMS using real-time analytics.
*   Understand how to manage both business-initiated and user-initiated messages to create seamless two-way interactions with customers
